title: selaginella asplundii
intro: Selaginella asplundii, also known as Asplund's spikemoss, is a type of evergreen fern-like plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against cell damage. Selaginella asplundii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
